title: Atmosphere and Aerial Perspective
description: A precomputed-LUT sky and aerial-perspective composition using the package SkyMaterial, SkyLightProbe, SunDirectionalLight, AerialPerspectiveEffect, lens flare, AGX tone mapping, and dithering path with one atmosphere model shared by sky radiance, sun transmittance, and surface-segment inscattering.
backend: WebGL2 / package sky and postprocessing effects
techniques: precomputed transmittance scattering and irradiance LUTs
AGX tone mapping plus lens flare and dithering
